title: God of War HeroPack
description: A HeroPack for the FiskHeroes / Fisk's SuperHeroes Mod that adds Kratos and various other characters from the God of War Universe
body:
# God of War HeroPack

A HeroPack for the Fisk's Superheroes Mod

This HeroPack adds Kratos and various other characters from the God of War Universe

[HeroPack Trailer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HN1ScQo8Fh8 'HeroPack Trailer')

[Check out our Discord](https://discord.com/invite/celestialnetwork 'Check out our Discord')

[Backup Discord Invite](https://discord.gg/ZbRGtPtbSs)

**How to Install:**
- Download the Latest Version of the [Fisk's SuperHeroes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fiskheroes)
- Download the [God of War HeroPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/god-of-war-heropack)
- Start up Minecraft
- Go to Options > HeroPacks > Open HeroPack Folder
- Place the God of War HeroPack into the HeroPack Folder (Do not Unzip the HeroPack File)
- Create or Join an Existing Minecraft World and Enjoy!

**Official Server:**
- Server IP: HeroPackVerse.net
- [Modrinth ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/heropack-verse-fiskheroes-server)
- [CurseForge ModPack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-heropack-verse-server)
- [Technic ModPack](https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/the-fiskheroes-server.1926692)

<details>
<summary>Suit List:</summary>

- Kratos
- Upgraded Kratos
- Atreus

Ragnarok Update:

- Kratos (Ragnarok)
- Atreus (Ragnarok)
- Thor
- Odin
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ragnarok Atreus Armor Sets:</summary>

- Brother's Brand Vestment
- Darkdale Attire

- Jotnar's Champion Garb
- Risen Snow Tunic

All Armor Sets are made accurate to their God of War Ragnarok counterparts and are alts for Atreus (Ragnarok)
</details>
 
<details>
<summary>Thor Armor Sets:</summary>

- Concept

Armor Set based on Thor's Early Concept Art from God of War 2018
</details>
 
<details>
<summary>Odin Armor Sets:</summary>

- Robeless

Armor Set of Odin without his "Robe"
</details>
 
<details>
<summary>How to Unlock:</summary>

Nodes:
Close your Heart to it: Use an axe to break a tree log in a Biome that begins with "Snow", "Ice" or "Cold". The type of axe or tree doesn't matter, you can use any axe and cut any type of tree. There is a chance system in-place, so if you don't unlock the Node the first few times of breaking a log, keep trying and you'll get a pop-up notification informing you that you've unlocked it.

The Boy has Fallen Ill: Wear the Atreus suit and get yourself Poison, Hunger, Weakness, and Slowness effects (How you get these effects doesn't matter)

Ragnarok Update:

The Lady of the Forge: As Upgraded Kratos, go into water while holding a piece of redstone named "Blood" (Must be the default Upgraded Kratos Armor, no alt)

Fimbulwinter: As Atreus, go to a Biome that begins with "Snow", "Ice" or "Cold".

Pissing Mead: Rename 50 water bottles to "Mead" and drink them (Must have Unlocked Ragnarok Kratos)

Allfather: Craft 64 Bookshelves (Must have Unlocked Thor)

Suits:
Kratos: Unlock Close your Heart to it

Atreus: Unlock Kratos

Upgraded Kratos: Unlock The Boy has Fallen Ill

Ragnarok Update:

Kratos (Ragnarok): Unlock The Lady of the Forge

Atreus (Ragnarok): Unlock Fimbulwinter

Thor: Unlock Pissing Mead

Odin: Unlock Allfather
</details>
 

**Commands:**

Command to Reload HeroPack:

>/fiskheroes reload --resources

Command to Reload Sounds:

>/fiskheroes reload --flushSoundCache

Command to Reload HeroPack and Sounds:

>/fiskheroes reload --resources --flushSoundCache

Command to give yourself a Suit:

>/suit

**Permissions:**

ModPack:

You may use this HeroPack in your ModPack as long as you first ask for and receive permission, then give credit and link back to this page.You are NOT allowed to modify this HeroPack!

 

Server:

You may use this HeroPack in your Server as long as you first ask for and receive permission, then give credit and link back to this page.You are NOT allowed to modify this HeroPack!

 

Warning:

Do NOT Re-Upload, Steal or Copy anything from this HeroPack!
